name: Card Sharp's Deck
description:
The cards of this deck shimmer around the edges. While holding this deck, you can use the following properties:
{"type": "list", "style": "list-hang-notitle", "items": [{"type": "item", "name": "Deadly Deal", "entries": ["As an action, you can use this deck to make a ranged spell attack by throwing a spectral card and using Dexterity for the attack roll.
